title: get reception rooms with valid authentication
description: Test GET /reception/rooms endpoint with a valid session cookie and reception role to ensure it returns a 200 HTML page containing the room status grid and modals.

title: get reception rooms without authentication or insufficient permissions
description: Test GET /reception/rooms endpoint without authentication or with insufficient permissions to verify it returns a 302 redirect to /login or a 403 access denied response.

title: post reception rooms checkin with valid data
description: Test POST /reception/rooms with action 'checkin' and all required fields provided, ensuring it returns a 302 redirect to /reception/rooms indicating successful check-in.

title: post reception rooms checkin with missing required fields
description: Test POST /reception/rooms with action 'checkin' but missing required fields such as guest_name or checkin_date, expecting a 400 validation error with a flash message.

title: post reception rooms checkout for occupied room
description: Test POST /reception/rooms with action 'checkout' for a room that is currently occupied, expecting a 302 redirect to /reception/rooms indicating successful checkout.

title: post reception rooms checkout for unoccupied room
description: Test POST /reception/rooms with action 'checkout' for a room that is not currently occupied, expecting a 400 validation error with a flash message.

title: post reception rooms transfer to available room
description: Test POST /reception/rooms with action 'transfer' to a target room that is available, expecting a 302 redirect to /reception/rooms indicating successful transfer.

title: post reception rooms transfer to occupied room
description: Test POST /reception/rooms with action 'transfer' where the target room is already occupied, expecting a 400 validation error with a flash message.

title: post reception rooms add charge with valid details
description: Test POST /reception/rooms with action 'add_charge' and valid charge details, expecting a 302 redirect to /reception/rooms indicating the charge was added successfully.

title: post reception experiences launch with valid data
description: Test POST /reception/experiences/launch with all required fields including a valid experience_id and scheduled_date in the future, expecting a 200 JSON success response.
